common.aiDisclaimer: AI-generated content — may be inaccurate and should be validated before use.
common.name: Name

auth.soloSubtitle: Enter your API key to access the dashboard
auth.teamSubtitle: Enter your credentials to access the dashboard

users.title: Dashboard Users
users.confirmDelete: Permanently delete user {{username}}? This cannot be undone.
users.noUsers: No dashboard users found. The system is running in solo mode (API key only). Adding the first user will activate team mode.

profile.title: My Profile
profile.passwordHint: Min 8 chars, uppercase, lowercase, number, special character
profile.notPasswordUser: Password change is only available for password-based accounts.
profile.authApiKeyNote: You are signed in with an API key.
profile.authSsoNote: Your password is managed by your SSO provider.
profile.authOauthNote: Your password is managed by the compliance service.

home.complianceHint: Search and select jurisdictions or regulations to check against.
home.noScans: No scans yet. Start your first scan using the quick scan form above.
home.scanDescription: Run a new accessibility scan with full configuration options — WCAG standard, compliance checking, authentication, and more.
home.brandScoreNoDataHint: Brand scores will appear here after your first scan with a linked brand guideline.

scans.configureHint: Configure and launch a new accessibility scan. Fields marked with * are required.
scans.singlePageHint: Scan only the specified URL (fast, pa11y default)
scans.fullSiteHint: Discover and scan up to {{maxPages}} pages via sitemap & crawl
scans.conformanceHint: WCAG2AA is recommended for most compliance requirements.
scans.complianceHint: Search and select jurisdictions or regulations. Leave empty to skip.
scans.testRunnerHint: The accessibility test runner. axe-core requires pa11y-runner-axe installed on the webservice.
scans.maxPagesHint: Maximum number of pages to discover and scan in full-site mode (1–1000).
scans.incrementalHint: Only re-scan pages that changed since the last scan of this URL. Automatically selects Full Site mode.
scans.errorJurisdictionOrRegulationRequired: Select at least one jurisdiction or regulation

reports.title: Reports
reports.noReportsDesc: Run your first accessibility scan to see results here.

schedules.title: Scan Schedules
schedules.noSchedules: No scheduled scans yet. Create one above to start automated scanning.

jurisdictions.searchAriaLabel: Search jurisdictions by name or ID
jurisdictions.noRegulationsLinked: No regulations linked to this jurisdiction.

regulations.jurisdictionReadonlyHint: Jurisdiction cannot be changed after creation

proposals.confirmAcknowledge: Acknowledge this regulatory change? The compliance data will be updated.
proposals.confirmReview: Apply this proposed change to compliance data?
proposals.confirmDismiss: Dismiss this proposal? No changes will be applied.

sources.systemSourceNote: System sources cannot be removed — they are maintained by the baseline data.
sources.fieldNameHint: A descriptive name for this source

monitor.noSourcesDesc: Add sources in the compliance service to monitor regulatory changes.
monitor.scanDescription: Check all monitored sources for regulatory changes and create proposals for any updates detected.
monitor.noProposalsDesc: Proposals appear here when monitored sources detect regulatory changes.
monitor.pendingChangesMsg: regulatory change(s) detected and awaiting review.

gitHosts.hostUrlHint: API base URL. Use https://api.github.com for GitHub, https://gitlab.com/api/v4 for GitLab, https://dev.azure.com for Azure DevOps.
gitHosts.removeConfirm: Remove this git host? Developer credentials for it will also be deleted.
gitHosts.noHosts: No git hosts configured. Add one below to enable repository integration.

plugins.noInstalled: No plugins installed. Browse available plugins below.
plugins.allInstalled: All available plugins are already installed.
plugins.usesGlobalConfig: Uses global configuration. You can customize after activating.
plugins.contactAdmin: Need a plugin that's not installed? Contact your system administrator.

teams.title: Teams
teams.description: Manage teams for issue assignment. Teams appear in the assignee picker alongside individual users.
teams.noTeams: No teams yet. Create one above.
teams.noMembers: No members yet. Add dashboard users above.
teams.orgLinkDesc: Link this team to an organization. Team members will inherit membership in the linked organization.
teams.roleLinkDesc: Assign an org-scoped role to this team. All team members inherit the role's permissions within the organization.

roles.noRoles: No roles found. Create your first custom role.
roles.systemNameHint: System role names cannot be changed.
roles.roleNameHint: Letters, numbers, hyphens and underscores only.
roles.descriptionPlaceholder: Describe what this role is for...
roles.permissionsHint: Select the permissions this role should have.
roles.globalRolesDescription: System-wide roles managed by administrators. These apply across all organizations.
roles.orgRolesDescription: Roles scoped to your organization. Org owners and admins can manage these.
roles.noOrgRoles: No organization roles found. Create one to define custom permissions for your org.
roles.cannotDeleteDefault: Default organization roles cannot be deleted.
roles.readOnly: You have read-only access to roles.

apiKeys.label: Label
apiKeys.noKeys: No API keys found. Create one to allow programmatic access.
apiKeys.revokedNote: This key has been revoked and can no longer be used.

orgApiKeys.title: Organization API Keys
orgApiKeys.label: Label
orgApiKeys.noKeys: No API keys for this organization. Create one to get started.
orgApiKeys.selectOrg: Select an organization first to manage API keys.
orgApiKeys.neverWarning: Keys without expiry are a security risk. Rotate manually.
orgApiKeys.noActiveKeys: No active API keys for this organization. Create one to get started.

serviceConnections.title: Service Connections
serviceConnections.description: Manage outbound OAuth connections to the compliance, branding, and LLM services. Credentials are encrypted at rest. Saving a change reloads the live client without a restart.

action.confirmClear: Clear the stored secret for this service? The live client will be rebuilt without credentials.

form.clientSecretHint: Leave blank to keep the current secret. Type a new value to replace it.

toast.reloadFailed: Save succeeded but client reload failed

systemBrand.title: System brand guidelines
systemBrand.description: Publish brand guideline templates that every organization can link to their sites or clone into their own workspace.

empty.heading: No system brand guidelines yet
empty.body: Create the first template to make it available to every organization.

systemBrand.confirmDelete: Delete "{{name}}"? Orgs that have linked this template will lose access on their next scan. Orgs that cloned it keep their copies.
systemBrand.deleteBlocked: Cannot delete "{{name}}" — {{count}} sites are currently linked to it. Unlink first, then retry.

library.emptyBody: Your dashboard admin has not published any system brand guidelines yet.

systemBrand.confirmClone: Clone "{{name}}" into your organization? You will be able to rename it on the next screen.
systemBrand.cloneSuccess: Cloned from system guideline — rename to finish.
systemBrand.linkSuccess: Linked "{{name}}" to {{siteUrl}}. Next scan will use the live system template.

clients.clientNameHint: A human-readable name for this client
clients.scopesHint: Space or comma-separated list of scopes

organizations.noOrganizations: No organizations yet. Create one to enable multi-tenant scoping.
organizations.slugHint: Lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens only
organizations.noMembers: No members in this organization yet.
organizations.orgMembersDescription: Members inherit their role from the team they belong to. Use the Teams page to manage team composition.
organizations.noLinkedTeams: No teams linked to this organization. Create teams from the Teams page and assign them to this org.
organizations.orgRolesDescription: These roles are scoped to this organization. Each team is assigned one of these roles.
organizations.noOrgRoles: No org-scoped roles found. They are created automatically when an organization is created.
organizations.manageViaTeamsDesc: Organization membership is managed through teams. Add users to a team linked to this organization to grant access.

settings.title: Organization Settings
settings.agentDisplayNameHint: Shown to users as the chat companion's name. Leave blank to use the default ("Luqen Assistant"). 40 characters max.
settings.agentDisplayNameTooLong: Name must be 40 characters or fewer.
settings.agentDisplayNameHtml: Name cannot contain HTML tags or URLs.
settings.agentDisplayNameError: Couldn't save display name. Try again.

emailReports.title: Email Reports
emailReports.pluginActiveNote: SMTP settings are managed via Admin > Plugins > Email Notifications & Reports.
emailReports.pluginInactiveNote: Recommended: Install and activate the Email Notifications & Reports plugin for encrypted SMTP credential storage and scan event notifications.
emailReports.smtpDescription: Configure your SMTP server to enable email report delivery.

dashboardUsers.passwordHint: Min 8 chars, uppercase, lowercase, number, special character

branding.title: Branding Guidelines
branding.noGuidelines: No branding guidelines configured. Create one to start classifying accessibility findings as brand-related.
branding.importDescription: Upload a CSV or JSON file to import brand guidelines.
branding.importContentPlaceholder: Paste CSV or JSON content here…
branding.importFormatHint: Download a template above to see the expected format.
branding.confirmDelete: Delete guideline "{{name}}"? This cannot be undone.
branding.noColors: No colors defined. Add colors to enable color matching.
branding.noFonts: No fonts defined. Add fonts to enable font matching.
branding.noSelectors: No selectors defined. Add selectors to enable selector-based matching.
branding.noSites: No sites assigned. Assign a site to apply this guideline to its scans.
branding.guidelineDescriptionPlaceholder: Optional description of this brand guideline set…
branding.discoverDescription: Automatically detect colors, fonts, and brand name from a web page URL.
branding.discoverEmpty: No brand signals detected — try a different URL.
branding.linkSiteAfterDiscover: Automatically link this site to the guideline
branding.cssImportDescription: Paste CSS content to extract brand colors (custom properties, hex values) and fonts (font-family declarations).
branding.cssImportSuccess: Imported {{colors}} color(s) and {{fonts}} font(s) from CSS.
branding.cssImportEmpty: No colors or fonts found in the provided CSS.

llm.noProviders: No providers configured. Add one below.
llm.noModelsForProvider: No models registered for this provider.
llm.noCapabilities: No capabilities found. Ensure the LLM service is seeded.
llm.noPromptsAvailable: Prompt management is not available when the LLM service is disconnected.
llm.capabilityFallbackIntro: Models are tried in priority order (lowest number first). If one fails, the next is tried automatically.
llm.capabilityFallbackFooter: If the primary model fails or times out, the system automatically tries the next one.
llm.capabilityNoModels: No models assigned. This capability is not available until a model is assigned.
llm.modelsNoProviders: No providers configured. Add a provider first.
llm.promptNoTemplate: This capability does not have a prompt template yet. It will be available in a future update.

prompts.staleWarning: This custom prompt was saved before protected sections were added.
prompts.staleExplanation: Click Migrate to automatically insert the current protected sections and keep your edits, then review and Save.
prompts.lockedSectionViolatedPrefix: Cannot save: locked section {{sections}} was modified.
prompts.lockedSectionViolatedHint: This section defines the required output format — the capability engine cannot parse responses without it.
prompts.formMismatch: Form segments don't match the template. Reload the page and try again.
prompts.resetModalWarning: This will permanently discard your customizations. The following changes will be lost:
prompts.noDifferences: This prompt matches the default — nothing to compare.
prompts.nothingToReset: This prompt is already using the system default.
prompts.lockedRbacTooltip: This section enforces per-user role-based access control. It cannot be edited to keep tenant isolation safe.
prompts.lockedConfirmTooltip: This section ensures destructive actions always request confirmation. It cannot be edited to keep user consent safe.
prompts.lockedHonestyTooltip: This section prevents the agent from fabricating tool results. It cannot be edited to keep audit trails accurate.
prompts.agentSystemGlobalOnly: Global only — per-org override disabled (prompt-injection defence)
prompts.agentSystemGlobalOnlyTooltip: Per-org system prompts are disabled for the agent to prevent prompt-injection attacks via org settings.

agentConv.nonToolBlock: This model doesn't support tool calls. Assign a tool-use model (e.g. Claude, GPT-4o, Llama 3.2 ≥ 3B).
agentConv.iterationCap: Max 5 tool calls per user turn — enforced in AgentService, not configurable.
agentConv.manifestSize: {{count}} MCP tools exposed to this org
agentConv.destructiveZero: No destructive tools in this manifest

audit.title: Agent Audit Log
audit.noRows: No audit rows match these filters.

trends.title: Issue Trends
trends.scorecardCaption: Accessibility scores per site with trend indicators
trends.summaryCaption: Summary of latest scan results per site with trend indicators
trends.noDataDesc: Complete at least two scans for the same site to see issue trends over time.

bookmarklet.title: Browser Bookmarklet
bookmarklet.dragHint: Drag the button below to your browser's bookmark bar. Then visit any website and click it to open a new Luqen scan with the URL pre-filled.
bookmarklet.dragAlertMsg: Drag this button to your bookmark bar instead of clicking it.
bookmarklet.step1: Drag the "Scan with Luqen" button above to your browser's bookmark bar.
bookmarklet.step2: Visit any website you want to scan for accessibility issues.
bookmarklet.step3: Click the bookmark — Luqen opens in a new tab with the URL pre-filled and ready to scan.
bookmarklet.manualInstallDesc: If drag-and-drop does not work, create a new bookmark manually and paste the following code as the URL:
bookmarklet.req1: The Luqen dashboard must be running and accessible at {{dashboardUrl}}.
bookmarklet.req2: You must be logged in to the dashboard for the scan to start.
bookmarklet.req3: Pop-up blockers may need to allow pop-ups from the site you are scanning.

scanProgress.statusQueued: Queued — waiting for a scan slot…

reportDetail.regulationEmpty: No regulations selected for this scan
reportDetail.sharedComponentsLabel: Shared components — fix once, fix everywhere
reportDetail.noIssues: No issues found in this report.
reportDetail.templateIntro: These issues appear on multiple pages and likely come from shared components. Fixing the component fixes all affected pages.
reportDetail.noIssuesOnPage: No issues found on this page.
reportDetail.noPageResults: No page results in this report.
reportDetail.fixLlmUnavailable: AI fix suggestions are unavailable. Showing a pattern-based suggestion.
reportDetail.aiSummaryUnavailable: AI summary is currently unavailable. The LLM service may not be configured or reachable.
reportDetail.brandScoreFirst: First brand score for this site
reportDetail.brandScoreNotAvailable: Brand score not available for this scan
reportDetail.brandScoreIntroduced: Brand scoring was introduced in v2.11.0
reportDetail.brandDrilldownEmpty: No failing elements found for this dimension.

reportCompare.title: Report Comparison
reportCompare.noNewIssuesDesc: No new accessibility issues were introduced in the latest scan.
reportCompare.noResolvedDesc: No issues from the baseline were resolved in the latest scan.
reportCompare.noSharedDesc: The two scans have no issues in common.
reportCompare.newIssuesExplain: These issues appeared in the latest scan but were not present in the baseline. They represent new accessibility regressions.
reportCompare.resolvedExplain: These issues were present in the baseline scan but are no longer detected. They have been fixed or the affected elements were removed.
reportCompare.unchangedExplain: These issues exist in both scans and have not been addressed yet.

reportPrint.heading: Accessibility Report
reportPrint.priorityActionDesc: Errors and warnings grouped by WCAG criterion — address these first. Notices omitted for clarity.
reportPrint.sharedComponentDesc: These issues appear in shared components — fixing the component resolves all affected pages.
reportPrint.topActionsDesc: The most impactful issues to address first — errors and regulatory warnings, sorted by severity and reach.
reportPrint.quickWinsDesc: These issues appear in shared components used across multiple pages. Fixing the component once resolves the issue everywhere.
reportPrint.quickWinFixOne: Fix once → resolves on all pages
reportPrint.fullDetailNote: For the complete issue list with selectors and code context, use the Excel export from the dashboard.
reportPrint.verdictFail: Action Required — accessibility violations detected that may breach legal requirements.
reportPrint.verdictPass: No confirmed violations detected. Review notices for potential improvements.
reportPrint.noData: Report data is not available for this scan.

manualTests.requiresManualDesc: These criteria cannot be verified by automated scanning tools.
manualTests.partiallyAutomatedDesc: Automation catches some issues but human verification is needed to confirm full compliance.

assignments.noAssignments: No assignments yet. Use the "Assign" buttons on the report issues tab to create assignments.

repos.title: Connected Repositories
repos.intro: Connect a git repository to a site URL pattern to enable automated fix proposals. When viewing a scan report, Luqen can suggest source-level code fixes for accessibility issues.
repos.localPathHint: Absolute path to the cloned repo on this server. Required for applying fixes directly.
repos.noRepos: No repositories connected yet. Use the form above to connect your first repository.
repos.integrationOptionsDesc: Fix proposals are also available via:
repos.integrationA2a: A2A protocol: agents can call the REST API to propose and apply fixes programmatically
repos.orgHint: Assign this repo connection to an organization.
repos.gitHostHint: Select the git host where this repo is hosted. Required for PR creation.

fixes.title: Fix Proposals
fixes.noReportData: Report data is not available. Fixes can only be proposed for completed scans.
fixes.noProposals: No automated fix proposals available for the issues in this report.
fixes.noProposalsHint: Fix suggestions are shown inline on the report detail page for issues that match known patterns.
fixes.integrationMcp: MCP tools in your IDE: Use luqen_propose_fixes and luqen_apply_fix to propose and apply fixes directly from VS Code, Cursor, or any MCP-compatible editor.
fixes.integrationRest: REST API: Returns fix proposals as JSON.
fixes.integrationA2a: A2A protocol: For automated pipelines, use the Agent-to-Agent protocol to request fixes programmatically. Agents can call the REST API to propose and apply fixes.
fixes.copyFailed: Could not copy — please select and copy manually
fixes.createPrDescription: Select the fixes above and create a pull request with the changes applied to your repository.

brandOverview.selectSite: Select a site to view its brand score
brandOverview.noSitesDesc: Link a brand guideline to a site and run a scan to see scores here.
brandOverview.sparklineDesc: Composite score with color, typography, and component dimension trends
rescore.confirmBody: This will score {{count}} completed scans that have no brand score yet. Already-scored scans will be skipped.
rescore.completeBody: {{scored}} scans scored. {{skipped}} already scored (skipped). {{warnings}} skipped -- guideline deleted.
rescore.alreadyRunning: Rescore already in progress for this organisation.
rescore.errorMessage: Rescore failed. {{reason}} -- try again from the button above.
agent.launch.label: Open {{name}}
agent.drawer.title: {{name}}
agent.firstOpen.greeting: Hi, I'm {{name}}. I can help with scans, reports, branding, and admin. What would you like to do?
agent.emptyThread.hint: Type a question below, or tap the microphone to speak.
agent.speech.error: Could not capture audio. Try again or type your message.
agent.speech.unsupported: Voice input isn't supported in this browser. Type your message below.
agent.error.streamBody: The assistant couldn't finish replying. This usually means the LLM provider is temporarily unavailable.
agent.error.rateLimitBody: You're sending messages too quickly. Try again in {{seconds}} seconds.
agent.error.iterationCapTitle: I stopped to avoid a loop
agent.error.iterationCapBody: I tried several tools but couldn't complete this in one go. Try rephrasing, or split the request.
agent.actions.copyFailed: Could not copy — try selecting the text manually
agent.actions.stopFailed: Could not stop the response cleanly
agent.confirm.title: Confirm destructive action
agent.confirm.intro: {{name}} wants to make a change that can't be undone automatically. Review the details before approving.
agent.confirm.approveFailedBody: The server could not confirm this action. Try again, or cancel to abort.
agent.newChat.label: Start a new conversation
agent.history.rename.errorServer: Couldn't rename this conversation. Try again.
agent.history.delete.error: Couldn't delete this conversation. Try again.
agent.history.empty.title: No conversations yet
agent.history.empty.body: Ask a question in chat — your conversation will appear here.
agent.history.noResults.title: No matches
agent.history.noResults.body: No conversations match "{{query}}". Try a different search term.
agent.history.error.loadBody: Check your connection and try again.
agent.tools.cap.label: Reached tool limit — producing answer with what we have
